addons.name: MCP add-on for 4SEO
addons.short_description: Adds Claude tools for 4SEO meta tags, redirects, JSON-LD, sitemap, and Business Profile management.
addons.notes: Paid add-on — install via Extensions → Install from URL with your download ID, until Phase 3 wires the in-catalog license flow.

addons.name: MCP add-on for RSTicketsPro
addons.short_description: Adds Claude tools for the RSTicketsPro ticket workflow: list, assign, reply, escalate, and resolve.
addons.notes: Paid add-on — install via Extensions → Install from URL with your download ID, until Phase 3 wires the in-catalog license flow.

addons.name: MCP add-on for Akeeba Backup Core
addons.short_description: Adds Claude tools for Akeeba Backup Core — list profiles, list/inspect backup records, start and step backups, manage archives. Works against the same engine the admin UI uses.
addons.notes: Free — only useful on sites running Akeeba Backup Core (com_akeebabackup). Tools refuse cleanly on sites without it. Restore is intentionally NOT exposed: Akeeba Backup Core has no in-admin restore — restore is via the external Kickstart script, which an MCP tool can't usefully orchestrate.

addons.name: MCP add-on for Cybersalt Release Manager
addons.short_description: Adds Claude tools for managing Cybersalt Release Manager — Packages, releases, installations, and activity log. Lets the MCP catalog inside cs-mcp-for-j dogfood itself.
addons.notes: Free — only useful on sites running cs-release-manager. Tools refuse cleanly on sites without it.
